<?php /** * sect113r1 * * PHP version 5 and 7 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2017 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://pear.php.net/package/Math_BigInteger */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\Curves; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC\BaseCurves\Binary; use phpseclib3\Math\BigInteger; class sect113r1 extends Binary { public function __construct() { $this->setModulo(113, 9, 0); $this->setCoefficients( '003088250CA6E7C7FE649CE85820F7', '00E8BEE4D3E2260744188BE0E9C723' ); $this->setBasePoint( '009D73616F35F4AB1407D73562C10F', '00A52830277958EE84D1315ED31886' ); $this->setOrder(new BigInteger('0100000000000000D9CCEC8A39E56F', 16)); } }
